steps.title: Compare causes of backlash
steps.content: Text 1 implies provocative public art produces backlash because it is not bland enough. Text 2's critics add that setting matters: public spaces may not prime passersby to appreciate challenging art.

steps.title: Name the critics' response
steps.content: A discusses placating civic leaders, which Text 2 does not. B says only universally appealing works belong in public, which the critics do not claim. C denies that unconventionality matters at all. The critics would add contextual causes. The answer is D.
